title: sql return error:ERROR 1105 (HY000): Can't find column  in schema Column: [] Unique key: []
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
DROP TABLE /*! IF EXISTS*/ mysql_1;
CREATE TABLE `mysql_3` (
`col_int_auto_increment` int(10) AUTO_INCREMENT,
`col_pk_char` char(60)  not null,
`col_pk_varchar` varchar(60) not null,
`col_pk_date` date not null,
`col_int` int,
`col_int__1` int,
`col_int_8` int(8),
`col_int_8__1` int(8),
`col_bigint` bigint,
`col_smallint` smallint,
`col_tinyint` tinyint,
`col_float` float,
`col_double` double,
`col_numeric` numeric,
`col_bit` bit,
`col_bit__1` bit,
`col_enum` enum ('a','b','c','d','e','f','g','h','i','j','k','l','m','n','o','p','q','r','s','t','u','v','w','x','y','z'),
`col_set` set ('a','b','c','d','e','f','g','h','i','j','k','l','m','n','o','p','q','r','s','t','u','v','w','x','y','z'),
`col_char_3` char(3),
`col_char_255` char(255),
`col_varchar_1` varchar(1),
`col_varchar_64` varchar(64),
`col_varchar_2048` varchar(2048),
`col_binary_8` binary(8),
`col_varbinary_8` varbinary(8),
`col_date` date,
`col_time` time,
`col_datetime` datetime,
`col_timestamp` timestamp ,
`col_year` year,
`col_text` text,
`col_bool` bool,
`col_boolean` boolean,
`col_longtext` longtext,
`col_mediumtext` mediumtext,
`col_tinyblob` tinyblob,
`col_mediumblob` mediumblob,
`col_longblob` longblob,
`col_blob` blob,
/*Indices*/
KEY `prefix_index2` (`col_char_255`(10)),
KEY `prefix_index1` (`col_text`(15)),
KEY `functional_index2` (`col_datetime`,`col_date`),
KEY `functional_index1` (`col_enum`,`col_year`,`col_int`),
KEY k2 (`col_int`,`col_char_255`),
KEY k1 (`col_pk_varchar`),
primary key (`col_int_auto_increment`,`col_pk_varchar`,`col_datetime`,`col_int`,`col_date`))  ;
ALTER TABLE `mysql_1` DISABLE KEYS;


select * from mysql_3 t1 where  exists ( SELECT DISTINCT a1.* FROM mysql_3 a1 WHERE ( a1.col_pk_char NOT IN  (  SELECT a1.col_pk_char FROM mysql_3 a1 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN mysql_3 a2 WHERE t1.col_pk_date IS NULL GROUP BY a1.col_pk_char   ) )     ) /* QNO 8668 CON_ID 2407531720 */  ;
```


### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
results from MySQL:
```
MySQL [chqin]> select * from mysql_3 t1 where  exists ( SELECT DISTINCT a1.* FROM mysql_3 a1 WHERE ( a1.col_pk_char NOT IN  (  SELECT a1.col_pk_char FROM mysql_3 a1 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN mysql_3 a2 WHERE t1.col_pk_date IS NULL GROUP BY a1.col_pk_char   ) )     ) /* QNO 8668 CON_ID 2407531720 */  ;
Empty set (0.00 sec)
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
results from tidb
```
mysql> select * from mysql_3 t1 where  exists ( SELECT DISTINCT a1.* FROM mysql_3 a1 WHERE ( a1.col_pk_char NOT IN  (  SELECT a1.col_pk_char FROM mysql_3 a1 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN mysql_3 a2 WHERE t1.col_pk_date IS NULL GROUP BY a1.col_pk_char   ) )     ) /* QNO 8668 CON_ID 2407531720 */  ;
ERROR 1105 (HY000): Can't find column chqin.mysql_3.col_pk_char in schema Column: [] Unique key: []
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

mysql> select tidb_version();
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v8.5.1
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: fea86c8e35ad4a86a5e1160701f99493c2ee547c
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-01-16 07:38:34
GoVersion: go1.23.4
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE mysql_3 (col_int_auto_increment UInt32, col_pk_char String NOT NULL, col_pk_varchar String NOT NULL, col_pk_date Date NOT NULL, col_int Nullable(UInt32), col_int__1 Nullable(UInt32), col_int_8 Nullable(UInt32), col_int_8__1 Nullable(UInt32), col_bigint Nullable(Int64), col_smallint Nullable(Int16), col_tinyint Nullable(Int8), col_float Nullable(Float32), col_double Nullable(Float64), col_numeric Nullable(Decimal(10, 2)), col_bit Nullable(UInt8), col_enum Enum8('a' = 1, 'b' = 2, 'c' = 3, 'd' = 4, 'e' = 5, 'f' = 6, 'g' = 7, 'h' = 8, 'i' = 9, 'j' = 10, 'k' = 11, 'l' = 12, 'm' = 13, 'n' = 14, 'o' = 15, 'p' = 16, 'q' = 17, 'r' = 18, 's' = 19, 't' = 20, 'u' = 21, 'v' = 22, 'w' = 23, 'x' = 24, 'y' = 25, 'z' = 26), col_set Array(Enum8('a' = 1, 'b' = 2, 'c' = 3, 'd' = 4, 'e' = 5, 'f' = 6, 'g' = 7, 'h' = 8, 'i' = 9, 'j' = 10, 'k' = 11, 'l' = 12, 'm' = 13, 'n' = 14, 'o' = 15, 'p' = 16, 'q' = 17, 'r' = 18, 's' = 19, 't' = 20, 'u' = 21, 'v' = 22, 'w' = 23, 'x' = 24, 'y' = 25, 'z' = 26)), col_char_3 String, col_char_255 String, col_varchar_1 String, col_varchar_64 String, col_varchar_2048 String, col_binary_8 Nullable(FixedString(8)), col_varbinary_8 Nullable(FixedString(8)), col_date Date, col_time Nullable(Time), col_datetime Nullable(DateTime), col_timestamp Nullable(DateTime64(3)), col_year Nullable(UInt16), col_text String, col_bool Nullable(UInt8), col_boolean Nullable(UInt8), col_longtext String, col_mediumtext String, col_tinyblob Nullable(FixedString(8)), col_mediumblob Nullable(FixedString(16)), col_longblob Nullable(FixedString(32)), col_blob Nullable(FixedString(64)));
INSERT INTO mysql_3 (col_pk_char, col_pk_varchar, col_pk_date, col_enum, col_bool) VALUES ('char1', 'varchar1', '2023-01-01', 'active', 1), ('char2', 'varchar2', '2023-01-02', 'inactive', 0);

SELECT * FROM mysql_3 t1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mysql_3 a1 WHERE a1.col_pk_char NOT IN (SELECT a1.col_pk_char FROM mysql_3 a1 JOIN mysql_3 a2 ON 1=1 WHERE t1.col_pk_date IS NULL GROUP BY a1.col_pk_char));
SELECT * FROM mysql_3 t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mysql_3 t2 WHERE t2.col_pk_char = 'NonExistentChar' AND t1.col_pk_date IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: SELECT with EXISTS clause on non-existing column
